judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with high valuation multiples and significant leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 242.4%; next earnings 2026-04-28.
positives: Revenue growth 130.4% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Analyst growth est, current FY 179.5% — strong future growth expected.
Last quarter EPS surprise 242.4% — significant beat on earnings.
Consensus is buy (24 analysts) — broad institutional support.
negatives: Forward P/E 73.38x — valuation is very high.
Price/Book 94.97x — market values the company significantly above its book value.
Profit margin 0.2% — very thin profitability despite high revenue growth.
Debt/Equity 311.48 — high leverage presents financial risk.
Beta 3.83 — stock is highly volatile relative to the market.
Mean target $245.13 vs current $307.88 — analysts see downside potential.

news.paragraph: Bloom Energy Corporation's recent analyst report from Morningstar Research provides a deep dive into the company's financial health and market position. While the report may offer insights, no specific recent catalysts like earnings surprises or major guidance changes are highlighted in the provided headlines. Traders should consider the analyst consensus and target prices as potential influences on near-term price action.
